commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c7f94f2f69fecb41b0535c068afe7f08c4e97ac9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds transcript-only OpenClaw assistant filtering to `sessions_history` and `/sessions/.../history` snapshot/SSE views, plus regression tests for filtering and raw overfetching.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +140. Total +192 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main sends raw `chat.history` rows through `sessions_history` with only tool filtering, and `/sessions/.../history` uses the generic display projection without the proposed transcript-only filter.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor/human follow-up because the code must preserve legitimate `gateway-injected` history rows and the external PR still needs real behavior proof before merge.

target.title: fix(gateway): filter transcript-only history rows
target.body:
Fixes #85669

Behavior addressed:
- `sessions_history` and session-history snapshot/SSE views no longer surface OpenClaw transcript-only assistant rows from `delivery-mirror` or `gateway-injected`.
- Generic chat display projection still keeps OpenClaw injected assistant rows for live delivery surfaces.
- `sessions_history` overfetches raw history before filtering, then applies the user-visible limit after transcript-only/tool filtering so hidden tail rows do not make the tool return an empty history.

Real environment tested:
- Local macOS checkout, Node/Vitest test suite in `/Users/godcorn/cursor/open-source/projects/openclaw-85669`.
- Subagent review was run after implementation; it found the no-limit raw-window issue, which this PR fixes by always requesting the 1000-row raw history window before filtering.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-core.config.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-methods.config.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts -t "keeps OpenClaw injected assistant rows"
OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts src/gateway/sessions-history-http.test.ts
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix:
- `src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts`: 20 tests passed.
- `src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts`: 18 tests passed.
- Targeted `server-methods.test.ts`: 1 passed, 103 skipped.
- `src/gateway/sessions-history-http.test.ts`: 16 tests passed.
- `git diff --check`: passed.

Observed result after fix:
- Transcript-only OpenClaw assistant rows are filtered from user-facing history recall surfaces.
- Tool rows remain controlled by `includeTools`.
- `sessions_history` applies explicit limits after filtering, and the no-limit path still asks the gateway for the larger raw window before filtering.
- Generic chat display behavior keeps OpenClaw injected assistant rows, preserving live projection behavior.

What was not tested:
- I did not replay a production Telegram or dashboard session against a running installed gateway. The validation is source-level regression coverage plus the HTTP history e2e test.
target.author: yuhao-corn
